subject: There's no denying this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Bernie's team is stepping up | Friend --

Late last night, Bernie Sanders' campaign announced they'd raised $1.4 million from 50,000 donations in a single day. The day before, they announced that the Reddit community had contributed more than $1 million to his campaign.

There's no denying this: His supporters are stepping up. They see a chance to win in Iowa and they're willing to go all in for their guy. **[Hillary can't do this if you're on the sidelines. You need to step up and match them.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ1ODc4MjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzI0MTQ2Njk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

If Donald Trump takes the Republican nomination, our party will lose more than the presidency. Years of progress will be ripped away. Obamacare will be repealed. Marriage equality will be rolled back. Get excited to visit the wall on the Mexico border -- and get ready to pay for it if President Trump can’t magically get Mexico to cough up the cash for it.

That's what's at stake here. It's about the future of our country. We can't let Bernie Sanders' supporters out-match us. It's not just about the nomination. It’s about what comes next.

name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Last night, in the
final Republican debate before the Iowa caucuses, voters had the
opportunity to distinguish between campaign conservatives who
talk a good game on the stump and a candidate who has been a
consistent, proven conservative over and over again.

At the end of the
debate, Ted closed with this: "93 hours. The media noise will
soon be over - and it's now for the men and women of Iowa to
decide. Our country is in crisis. We're worried for the future of
our children and we've been burned over and over again. The
central question in this race is trust. Who do you know will kill
the terrorists, defend the Constitution, and repeal Obamacare?
Who do you know will stop amnesty and secure the borders? Who do
you know will defend life, marriage and religious liberty?
Examine our records, pray on it, and I would be honored if you
and your family would come and caucus for us Monday night."

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is a clear victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The reviews are in and last night was a
resounding success.
The moderators did a good job and I had
enough time to get my message out.
Analysts across the country are saying this
was a big moment for our campaign. Even the Washington Times is
calling me the winner.
I took on Ted Cruz for his failure to show up
for the Audit the Fed vote. I called out Marco Rubio for his
unsafe immigration policies. And I stood for fiscal sanity, once
again proving I am the true fiscal conservative of this race.
And as it turns out that standing for liberty
and real conservative principles does resonate with people.
I think we're all tired of the politicians
going from talking point to talking point with their next big
interview in mind. I could care less about that sort of thing --
I went to the debate to prove a point about the recklessness of
Washington's failed spending policies.
And I did.
I took on debt, the Fed, reckless immigration
policies, and spending plans with trillions of dollars that we
don't have. Our safety, a secure future for America, will not
come from the budget, but by following the Constitution and the
Bill of Rights.
Now that they are saying we won the debate we
need to take action and make sure that we can capitalize on the
momentum in time for the Iowa Caucus.
We've got a great ground game and I do expect
to win, but I need your help to make sure we can continue to
spread our message of liberty, make our calls, and get out the
vote in the field.

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Your donation of any size would make a big
difference.
This debate victory is showing finally
proving that no matter how hard the media tries, they cannot
block out the message of liberty.
We will not be silenced.
Will you stand with me once again?

In Liberty,
Rand

subject: Clock is ticking

body:
Dear Patriot,
Media stories are still being written about
my clear victory in last night's debate.

One ABC News commentator even stated I
"intimidate" my opponents with my strong stands for liberty and
the Constitution!

Patriot, last night's debate was exactly the
boost of momentum I needed -- right when it matters most.

But with the clock counting down, will you
please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or
even $10 right away?

Debates are very important, but campaigns
aren't won there.

They are won with strong campaign
organizations, energetic volunteers, person-to-person contact,
and a message that truly inspires.

With our precinct leaders, identified support
on college campuses, and my campaign headquarters buzzing with
excitement, I believe we're set to shock people Monday.

In fact, we're closing in on one million
phone calls!

But time is so short . . .

Will you please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25, or even $10 right away?

In liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: Peter, this is a problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---

---

Peter,

During the time that Dr. Carson was provided at last night's debate, he clearly demonstrated his commitment to the American people, our Judeo-Christian values, and our Constitution.

But here's the problem -- take a look at the chart below from NPR.

**Dr. Carson was given the least opportunity to share his message. It's clear the media and political establishment is about sound bites over substance and spectacle over solutions.**
---
From the start of this campaign, Dr. Carson has been true to his word. He's run a positive campaign about creating a safer, more hopeful future. He's refused to get into the mud pit even when provoked by the media or other candidates. It's because he's interested not in dividing, but in healing and uniting America. And for that, our system brushes him aside.

[**It's wrong -- but you can help us push back right now by making an urgent donation.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33196055:sp6OBOyNz:m:1:876315805:FB39DEC0EB8F01D1C334EB1DA9FE1EF0:r)

At this very moment, our staff and volunteers are scattered all across Iowa sharing Dr. Carson's story, values and message with voters -- and explaining how and where they can caucus for him on February 1st. Additionally, we're doing everything possible to blanket the airwaves with our TV ads. It's the only way we can bypass the media filter and communicate straight to voters.

**Everything will come to a head in 3 days. On February 1st, we'll face the ultimate test.

****Your donation right now will directly help us to recruit more caucus goers, knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and run more TV ads. It's that simple.**

The process of choosing who will replace Barack Obama will be officially underway and it's in our hands to ensure that on January 20, 2017, Dr. Ben Carson becomes President Ben Carson.

[**Peter, please make an urgent donation right now. Big or small, it all adds up and it will help us sprint right to the finish line.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33196055:sp6OBOyNz:m:1:876315805:FB39DEC0EB8F01D1C334EB1DA9FE1EF0:r)

Thank you for your commitment to Dr. Carson, and to re-establishing our Founding Fathers' vision of a government that is truly of, by and for the people.

Sincerely,

Ed Brookover
Campaign Manager
Ben Carson for President

Friend --

body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Our campaign is at a moment of truth: the Iowa caucus is just three days away, we're neck and neck with Hillary Clinton, and just yesterday one of her super PACs went on television trying to tip the balance of the race in her favor.
I want to be very clear with you about something: **You are our movement.** We don't have any billionaires waiting in the wings with bags of cash, no saviors from the oligarchy are going to swoop in and save the day. This campaign is led by ordinary people who have had enough of the influence of the billionaire class in this country. It's led by you.
So I have to ask you directly: Can I count on you to contribute $3 to our campaign before midnight tonight? Today is the last day to contribute and have it go towards our campaign in Iowa. You can do that here:
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/lets-win-Iowa**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c79/43f17890/7e1e47e3/6209fbf5/2468594040/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-win-iowa?refcode=em160129am-v1-full")

In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Bernie Supporters -
Take a look at the response from Bernie's email this morning: this is what it looks like when millions of Americans come together to say they have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our candidates and elections.

body:
| Dear Friend,

This campaign is built on the passionate belief that voters have the power to make a difference when they engage in the democratic process. When Chris was first elected to Congress, it was that same people power that made all the difference and overcame the odds.

Once again, despite the fact that we are being targeted by a national Super PAC that has already spent $1 million in outside money, this campaign rests solidly in the hands of Maryland voters who have been stepping up and mobilizing across our state, knocking on doors and joining phone banks to call their neighbors.

With less than 100 days until Election Day, we need you to stand with Chris to send a strong message that Maryland voters will decide this race -- not outside Super PACs.

**[Click here to donate and help us counter the influence of this national Super PAC.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce5/70cdc2ba/47c653f4/3965c8b/1047742881/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ **[Or, donate another amount](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce5/70cdc2ba/47c653f4/3965c84/1047742881/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em012916_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em012916_1&source=em012916_1")** Working families in our state need a champion that knows how to get things done for them, not just talk about it. That's why groups like the Maryland Firefighters, the SEIU, the Sierra Club, the United Auto Workers, and CASA de Maryland have all come out in support of Chris -- because they know he gets results for the people of Maryland. He will be there for us on issues big and small -- just like he always has.

Our opponent refused to accept Chris's Maryland Pledge against letting Super PAC money into this race, and now in parts of our state, the airwaves have been flooded by $1 million of outside Super PAC spending -- and we don't know how much more to expect in the days and weeks ahead!

With your help, we can double-down on our efforts to make sure this campaign is decided by people like you.

**[Donate $25 now and help our people powered campaign keep up its momentum.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce5/70cdc2ba/47c653f4/3965c85/1047742881/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em012916_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+and+help+our+people+power&utm_campaign=em012916_1&source=em012916_1")**

Team Van Hollen

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Why we ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Time is running out before our Iowa caucus fundraising deadline at midnight, so I need to take a moment to share with you why these emails are so important to our campaign.
Earlier this week, Hillary Clinton left Iowa to attend a financial services fundraiser on the East Coast. We don't know how much she raised, but it must have been many millions to compel her to leave the state in the critical days before the caucus. At the same time, her largest super PAC started a massive series of advertisements to tip the balance in her favor.
**But you know Bernie. He doesn 't go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money. There's no super PAC waiting in the wings. Emails like this one fund our campaign.**
The clock is ticking and we're getting so close to our goal of 3 million individual contributions made online, so we have to ask before midnight:
**[Can Bernie count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign? It's the last chance to contribute and have the maximum impact before the Iowa caucus. This is important.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec81/2554739901/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-win-iowa?refcode=em160129pm-full-e")**
There's only three days before the Iowa caucus, and we are neck and neck. How we perform will have a tremendous impact on the future of our political revolution. It is no exaggeration to say the entire country and much of the world will be watching to see if we have what it takes to defeat the billionaire class, starting here in Iowa on Monday.
History has its eyes on us.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec81/2554739901/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-win-iowa?refcode=em160129pm-full-e")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec8e/2554739901/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec8f/2554739901/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec8c/2554739901/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2c40/43f17890/7e9425fe/6209ec8d/2554739901/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
